title: langchain-ai/langchain
author: langchain-ai
summary: LangChain is an open-source framework designed to simplify the development of applications powered by large language models (LLMs), with a strong focus on agent-based architectures. It provides modular abstractions for chaining components like prompts, models, tools, and memory, enabling flexible agent engineering and integration with external data sources or APIs. Its value lies in accelerating prototyping and production deployment of LLM-driven agents, especially in RAG and tool-augmented reasoning scenarios.
